proposition: As part of the acquisition, Vít Schlesinger became a shareholder of Able.cz s.r.o. itself — exactly 5.00 % (vklad 12,185.75 CZK), registered 29 July 2025.
shortTitle: As part of the acquisition, Vít Schlesinger became a shareholder…
statusExplanation: Přímo doloženo primárním/oficiálním zdrojem (např. přímý výpis rejstříku nebo zakládaná listina).
note: Stake size primary-verified 2026-07-18; the observation that neither Forbes.cz nor CzechCrunch mentioned this reciprocal stake is CLM-51 (assessment).
